text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: OCC 2023-17: Contract negotiations (5.1) and mandatory provisions (5.2) must address third-party risk management
requirements including termination rights, audit access, sub-contracting controls, and business continuity obligations per OCC

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act): Mandatory provisions (5.2) must incorporate DORA Article 30 contractual
requirements for ICT third-party service providers, including SLA specifications, data location, audit rights, and exit strategies.
Controls configuration (5.3) must align with DORA operational resilience testing standards.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: SOX: Contract provisions and controls configuration must satisfy SOX Section 404 internal control requirements.
Remediation assignment (5.4) closes findings from Phase 3 due diligence, creating an auditable remediation trail.
Phase 5 Quality Gate approval constitutes a mandatory financial controls sign-off.
